---
language: swift
exerciseType: 1
---

# --instructions--

Tienes `60` productos en el `store`, durante el día vendiste `50` de ellos y `compraste` `55` nuevos.
Actualiza la cantidad del `store`.

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --seed--

```swift
var store = 60
var sold = 50
var bought = 55
// escribe después de esta línea
```

# --asserts--

`store` debe ser igual a `65`.

```swift
tryCatch(store == 65)
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
var store = 60
var sold = 50
var bought = 55
store += bought - sold;
```
